column3: ['Provide an invalid frozen-model with missing metadata to the system. ', 'Request the system to generate amlas/sace case, frozen-model manifest and explainability evidence for the given model. ', 'Verify that no valid artifact is generated or an error message is displayed indicating failure. ']
column4: ['The provided model should be identified as having missing metadata. ', 'The system initiates the generation process of the requested artifacts. ', 'No valid artifact (amlas/sace case, frozen-model manifest, and explainability evidence) should be generated; instead, an error message should indicate the failure to generate the required artifacts. ']
